prompt: Workplan: replace substring/evidence-strict reconciler in hex-cli/src/commands/sched/ with an aux-model LLM judge. Per ADR-2026-05-13-1500 (fail-open twin judge + hex goal verb) section 2. New auxiliary.reconciler_judge config slot, default T1 local model (qwen3:4b or gemma4). Fail-open semantics: judge error/timeout/malformed JSON treated as 'continue'. Turn budget sched.max_judge_turns default 20 — only the budget can mark a workplan task failed, never the judge directly. Behind feature flag sched.judge_mode: substring | aux_model, default substring during shadow rollout, flip to aux_model after a week of dual-run telemetry. Files: hex-cli/src/commands/sched/, hex-cli/src/config.rs, .hex/project.json schema. Evidence: cargo test on the judge module, dual-run telemetry shows aux_model FP-rate <10% vs substring's 70%.
